  "findings": [
    "Free conductor length inside box is less than 6 inches — does not meet NEC 300.14 minimum",
    "Insufficient conductor length prevents proper device termination and compromises safe connection"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-pull or extend conductors to provide minimum 6 in. free length measured from box opening",
    "If conductors cannot be extended, replace with longer runs or install an accessible junction box to regain required length"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 300.14 requires at least 6 in. of free conductor at every box for outlets, switches, and lighting fixtures. A conductor shorter than 6 in. is a non-compliant installation that prevents proper device termination and creates a safety hazard.",
  "references": ["NEC 300.14", "NEC 314.16"]
}
